common.autoDelete: Files are automatically deleted after 30 minutes

imageToPDF.title: Image to PDF
imageToPDF.description: Transform your images, photos, into polished, high-quality PDFs.

pngToPDF.title: PNG to PDF
pngToPDF.description: Convert PNG images to PDF with transparency support and high quality.

jpgToPDF.title: JPG to PDF
jpgToPDF.description: Convert JPG/JPEG photos to PDF documents with optimal quality.

heicToPDF.title: HEIC to PDF
heicToPDF.description: Convert iPhone HEIC photos to PDF documents easily.

mergePDF.title: Merge PDFs
mergePDF.description: Merge multiple PDFs into a single, streamlined document.

splitPDF.title: Split PDF
splitPDF.description: Split PDF documents into separate pages or custom page ranges.

compressPDF.title: Compress PDF
compressPDF.description: Reduce PDF file size while maintaining quality. Get your files under 1MB for PAN card, passport, and job applications.

pdfToWord.title: PDF to Word
pdfToWord.description: Convert PDF files to editable Word documents. Preserve formatting, images, and text layout for easy editing.

secure.title: 100% Secure
secure.description: Your files are encrypted in transit and automatically deleted after processing

fast.title: Lightning Fast
fast.description: Advanced algorithms ensure quick processing of your PDF files

private.title: Private & Confidential
private.description: We never store or share your files - your data stays yours

autoDelete.title: Auto File Deletion
autoDelete.description: All uploaded files are automatically deleted after 30 minutes

cloud.title: No Installation Needed
cloud.description: Work with PDFs directly in your browser - no software required

compression.targetSizeHelp: The tool will try to achieve this file size
compression.fastCompressionDesc: Advanced algorithms compress your PDFs in seconds while preserving quality.
compression.secureDesc: Your files are processed locally and automatically deleted after 30 minutes.
compression.panCardReadyDesc: Optimized for Indian document requirements. Get files under 1MB easily.
compression.balancedDesc: Good balance of quality and size
compression.targetSizeNote: The tool will try to achieve the target size while maintaining quality
compression.tip1: • For PAN card applications, use "Maximum Compression" with 1MB target size
compression.tip2: • For professional documents, use "High Quality" to maintain readability
compression.tip3: • PDFs with many images compress better than text-heavy documents
compression.tip4: • Already compressed PDFs may not reduce significantly in size
